title: L'éternité pour nous
writer: G.J. Arnaud, José Bénazéraf, Grisha Dabat
actors: Monique Just, Michel Lemoine, Sylvia Sorrente
plot: A moody pianist-composer and his voluptuous strip-tease dancing babe are avoiding reality at a French seaside resort. The resort's young female manager has a dying husband on her hands, and becomes attracted to the composer. When ...
